prerequisites: A Linnworks account with access to the Linnworks Developer Portal at https://developer.linnworks.com using the account holder email address.
A registered Application of type System Integration, which provides the Application Id (application_id) and Application Secret (application_secret).
The application installed on the target Linnworks account, which yields the installation Token (token) used to authorize API calls.
A start_date value defining the earliest point from which to begin syncing data.

authMethods.name: Application credentials (AuthorizeByApplication)
authMethods.summary: Linnworks authenticates by exchanging three credentials for a session token. Provide the Application Id, the Application Secret (application_secret), and the installation Token (token) to the POST /api/Auth/AuthorizeByApplication endpoint. The connector uses these to obtain a session token for subsequent API requests; the session token expires after 20 minutes of inactivity, so the connector re-authorizes using the same Application Id, Secret, and Token.

setupSteps.title: Create a System Integration application
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Linnworks Developer Portal at https://developer.linnworks.com using your account holder email. Create a new application, give it an Application Name, and select System Integration as the application type. Saving generates an Application Id and an Application Secret.

setupSteps.title: Install the application to get a Token
setupSteps.body: Open the App Modules tab and click Create New Version, then use the Installation URL from the application's General page to install the application on your Linnworks account. Installation returns a permanent installation Token. This is the value the connector's token field requires.

setupSteps.title: Collect Application Id and Application Secret
setupSteps.body: From the application's General page in the developer portal, copy the Application Id into the connector's application_id field and the Application Secret into the application_secret field.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter application_id, application_secret, and token from the steps above, and set start_date to the earliest date from which the connector should sync records. The connector calls AuthorizeByApplication with these credentials to obtain a session token for API calls.

sources.title: Generating an API Key - Linnworks API Docs
